site.name: Paula's Choice
site.mechanism_justification: The site requires UC Chrome with datacenter proxy (standard Playwright and direct HTTP are blocked). JS rendering is required — standard CSS selectors (h1, price, sku, etc.) are not found in initial HTML, indicating client-side rendering. However, JSON-LD Product structured data is present in the rendered page, providing a reliable data extraction path.

anti_bot.details: Standard Playwright and direct HTTP connections are blocked. UC Chrome with datacenter proxy successfully bypasses the detection. No CAPTCHA challenge observed on successful connection (probe reports captcha-free when using UC Chrome).

connectivity.notes: UC Chrome with datacenter proxy is the ONLY connectivity method that works. Standard Playwright MCP and direct HTTP are blocked. No CAPTCHA appears on successful connection.

extraction.notes: All common CSS selectors (h1, price, sku, availability, rating) return NOT FOUND. Page content is fully JavaScript-rendered. JSON-LD Product block is the most reliable extraction method. A FAQPage JSON-LD block is also present.

product_discovery.url_pattern_notes: Product URLs follow the pattern: /{product-slug}/{numeric-product-id}.html. The product ID is a numeric code (e.g., 777). The slug is a hyphenated product name.

rate_limiting.justification: Medium anti-bot detection present. UC Chrome with datacenter proxy required. Conservative delay to avoid detection while scraping.
